title: Egyptian Crispy Rice Tagine
description: A sweet and savory North African dessert, featuring crispy rice, caramelized sugar, and Egyptian spices.
instructions: In a saucepan, melt the butter over low heat. Add the caramelized sugar and stir until dissolved.
Add the Egyptian rice to the saucepan and stir until well coated.
Transfer the rice mixture to a baking dish and top with crispy rice cereal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
